prestazioni: G-Power SK III RS supercharger kit (S63B44T2 engine) with 800 HP and 900 Nm, featuring a custom billet crankshaft pulley, reinforced internals, and a G-Power-specific intercooler with dual 1,200 CFM cooling capacity

Akrapovič Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system with quad 100mm tips, 304 stainless steel headers, and a valved center muffler delete for optimized backpressure on the S63B44T2’s twin-scroll turbochargers

MCS 3-way adjustable coilovers (F10-specific valving) with remote reservoirs, 24-position rebound damping, and 12-position compression damping, paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars for track-focused weight transfer control
estetica: Vorsteiner V-FF 107 21" forged wheels in gloss black with staggered 285/30 front and 325/25 rear Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires, shod with custom 5x112mm to 5x120mm adapters for aggressive fitment
RKS Design F10 M5 widebody conversion kit with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom 3-piece rear diffuser with integrated Gurney flaps for downforce optimization

LuxuryTuning carbon fiber front splitter with adjustable canards, paired with a custom 3D-printed rear wing mount for a 1,800mm wide APR Performance GTC-300 wing in raw carbon fiber, supported by a reinforced F10-specific subframe brace
